descriptionText: Benetti B.Loft For Sale|Guest Cabins:6|Crew Cabins8The Benetti B.Loft 65M represents a thoughtful evolution in contemporary yacht design, and this newly built‑on‑order vessel now offered as Benetti B.Loft For Sale is presented in good condition, reflecting the careful engineering and craftsmanship Benetti is known for. Designed for modern yacht owners who value open spaces, quiet luxury, and a seamless connection to the sea, the B.Loft 65M introduces a fresh approach to onboard living. Her design draws inspiration from metropolitan lofts and open-plan villas, resulting in a calm, spacious atmosphere throughout her decks.(Build on order)Specifications:• Brand: Benetti • Year: Build on Order • Length: 65 m • Max Beam: 10.6 m • Construction: Steel / Aluminium • Draught: 3 m • Gross Tonnage: 1,200 GT • Guest Cabins: 6 • Crew: 8The interiors are shaped around tall ceilings and fluid layouts, allowing each area to blend gently into the next. Large floor-to-ceiling windows highlight the strong emphasis on natural light, creating a warm environment and framing impressive ocean views from nearly every angle. This design philosophy gives the yacht a distinctive sense of openness without compromising privacy or functionality.Externally, Benetti and Cassetta Yacht Designers have crafted a profile defined by clean lines and layered decks. The geometry of the yacht focuses on verticality and openness, giving her a confident, well-balanced presence on the water. The limited use of teak helps reduce heat absorption, contributing to a comfortable onboard atmosphere during long periods at sea.A highlight of the Benetti B.Loft For Sale 65M is the array of terraces and fold-out wings that expand the living areas. These outdoor spaces echo the feeling of refined coastal villas, creating opportunities to enjoy the surrounding seascape. The beach platform, extending to nearly 40 square metres when unfolded, offers a practical and peaceful connection to the water.One of the standout features is the Cabana Club, located at the beach area. This quiet retreat is finished in a minimal style, with glass walls that allow light from the plunge pool above to filter into the space. With doors that open on three sides, the Cabana Club provides an inviting 180‑degree view over the sea, making it a relaxing spot for guests who want to enjoy the environment while staying sheltered.The Main Deck offers a semi-covered aft area of over 120 square metres, furnished with understated loose furniture. This space can be left open for an outdoor lifestyle or enclosed on request to create additional interior volume. Inside, the Main Deck is centred around a welcoming lobby and a dining room featuring full-height windows and a practical connection to the galley. A second lobby with a winter garden and foldable balcony extends the deck’s versatility.The Upper Deck continues the theme of space and height. With ceilings reaching four metres, the deck includes an extended lobby and generous natural light, enhanced by the skylight from the Sun Deck hot tub positioned above. Altogether, these features contribute to a well-balanced yacht suitable for owners seeking understated comfort, thoughtful design, and strong indoor-outdoor integration.This Benetti B.Loft For Sale is a compelling option for buyers seeking a modern yacht in good condition with a fresh architectural approach and well‑designed living spaces.
descriptionHtml:
Benetti B.Loft For Sale|Guest Cabins:6|Crew Cabins8

The Benetti B.Loft 65M represents a thoughtful evolution in contemporary yacht design, and this newly built‑on‑order vessel now offered as Benetti B.Loft For Sale is presented in good condition, reflecting the careful engineering and craftsmanship Benetti is known for. Designed for modern yacht owners who value open spaces, quiet luxury, and a seamless connection to the sea, the B.Loft 65M introduces a fresh approach to onboard living. Her design draws inspiration from metropolitan lofts and open-plan villas, resulting in a calm, spacious atmosphere throughout her decks.

(Build on order)

Specifications:

• Brand: Benetti
• Year: Build on Order
• Length: 65 m
• Max Beam: 10.6 m
• Construction: Steel / Aluminium
• Draught: 3 m
• Gross Tonnage: 1,200 GT
• Guest Cabins: 6
• Crew: 8

The interiors are shaped around tall ceilings and fluid layouts, allowing each area to blend gently into the next. Large floor-to-ceiling windows highlight the strong emphasis on natural light, creating a warm environment and framing impressive ocean views from nearly every angle. This design philosophy gives the yacht a distinctive sense of openness without compromising privacy or functionality.

Externally, Benetti and Cassetta Yacht Designers have crafted a profile defined by clean lines and layered decks. The geometry of the yacht focuses on verticality and openness, giving her a confident, well-balanced presence on the water. The limited use of teak helps reduce heat absorption, contributing to a comfortable onboard atmosphere during long periods at sea.

A highlight of the Benetti B.Loft For Sale 65M is the array of terraces and fold-out wings that expand the living areas. These outdoor spaces echo the feeling of refined coastal villas, creating opportunities to enjoy the surrounding seascape. The beach platform, extending to nearly 40 square metres when unfolded, offers a practical and peaceful connection to the water.

One of the standout features is the Cabana Club, located at the beach area. This quiet retreat is finished in a minimal style, with glass walls that allow light from the plunge pool above to filter into the space. With doors that open on three sides, the Cabana Club provides an inviting 180‑degree view over the sea, making it a relaxing spot for guests who want to enjoy the environment while staying sheltered.

The Main Deck offers a semi-covered aft area of over 120 square metres, furnished with understated loose furniture. This space can be left open for an outdoor lifestyle or enclosed on request to create additional interior volume. Inside, the Main Deck is centred around a welcoming lobby and a dining room featuring full-height windows and a practical connection to the galley. A second lobby with a winter garden and foldable balcony extends the deck’s versatility.

The Upper Deck continues the theme of space and height. With ceilings reaching four metres, the deck includes an extended lobby and generous natural light, enhanced by the skylight from the Sun Deck hot tub positioned above. Altogether, these features contribute to a well-balanced yacht suitable for owners seeking understated comfort, thoughtful design, and strong indoor-outdoor integration.

This Benetti B.Loft For Sale is a compelling option for buyers seeking a modern yacht in good condition with a fresh architectural approach and well‑designed living spaces.
